introSection:
Olympic Bobsled is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently owned by US carnival operator Helm and Sons Amusements.

It has operated at the San Diego County Fair in San Diego, California, USA
fullText:
Olympic Bobsled is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently owned by US carnival operator Helm and Sons Amusements.

It has operated at the San Diego County Fair in San Diego, California, USA
